title: Living Shield
move_pattern: Starts with Shield Slam. After Shield Slam, checks ally count: if allies remain, repeats Shield Slam; if no allies remain, switches to Smash permanently (loops on itself).
notes: Rampart Power (25) applied on spawn. Shield Slam deals only 6 damage but is used until all allies are dead. Once all allies are dead, switches to Smash (18 damage + 3 Strength each turn) and never returns to Shield Slam.
